title: No More Copper
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

Sick of seeing Copper generating all over the world? This mod removes Copper from generating in your world completely.

## Why this over other mods?

This mod has greater compatibility than the other copper removing mods I could find, and doesn't bring more iron, as copper is removed completely, not replaced.

## Note

Compatibility for ~1.17 is unfortunately not possible due to the lack of easy editing of ore generation.

_Supports 1.18 up to 1.21_
